task_objective: Virtual Try-On & 9-View 3x3 - Dress Figure 2 outfit onto Figure 1 character (pose preserved), magazine editorial poses

input_assets.outfit_reference: Figure 2 outfit (cut, fabric, pattern, color, accessories) - FULL PRESERVATION REQUIRED

workflow.step_1: Extract Figure 2 outfit design + parse Figure 1 character pose & proportions
workflow.step_2: Dress Figure 2 outfit onto character, seamless fit, physically accurate draping. view_1 preserves Figure 1 original pose exactly
workflow.step_3: Generate 9 views (1 original pose + 8 editorial poses), assemble 3x3 grid with cinematic grading

outputs.view_1: Original Pose - Figure 1 pose STRICTLY preserved, only outfit changes to Figure 2
outputs.view_2: Crossed Legs - Standing, legs crossed, relaxed sophisticated posture
outputs.view_3: Hair Toss - Hand sweeping hair back, elbow raised, neck tilted, dreamy gaze
outputs.view_4: Over-Shoulder - Turning back, revealing front details + back silhouette
outputs.view_5: The Kneel - Kneeling on grass, hand holding Hair, outfit spread softly, sweet relaxed gaze.
outputs.view_6: The Curtsy - Standing upright, hand lifting outfit, showcasing outfit details, aristocratic elegance.
outputs.view_7: The Pose - One leg lifted, hand on hip, holding phone for mirror selfie, dramatic high-fashion stance
outputs.view_8: Car Seated - Elegantly seated in car, legs forward, showcasing fit & leg lines
outputs.view_9: Asymmetrical Cross - Arms crossed with space, asymmetric leg stance, unapproachable high-fashion attitude

output_requirements: NO text/labels/watermarks; Figure 2 outfit 100% preserved across all 9 views
view_1 MUST strictly preserve Figure 1 original pose - only outfit changes
Model: Asian/Caucasian/African (face & identity from model type, NOT from Figure 1), auto-adapted, consistent
SFW; realistic fabric draping & dynamic response to each pose; consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
Premium 3x3 - cinematic grading, magazine editorial standard
